description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on workflow dispatch. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12). For each Python version, check out the repository, set up Python, upgrade pip, install dependencies from requirements-tests.txt, lint with flake8, and run tests with pytest.
